name: Worm Puzzle Snake Apple
description: Worm Puzzle: Snake Apple combines classic snake gameplay with creative puzzle challenges. You solve spatial problems, escape traps, and guide snakes through clever levels. With funny snake movements and playful interactions, it brings a strong Funny vibe while still offering smart puzzle challenges. Fans of casual games enjoy its relaxing pace, while puzzle lovers enjoy the deep puzzle design. It also offers a calming relaxation flow with surprising twists in every level.
instructions: On PC Arrow keys Drag to move On Mobile Click the on-screen button to operate
